title: Tropgo Luxury Mix - Savoury Mixed Nuts in a Resealable and Recyclable Nut Tub - Guilt Free Trail Mix with Fibre Protein and Essential Minerals - Healthy Assorted Nuts for All Ages (180G)
features: Party of Nut Flavours in a Tub: Satisfy your nut cravings with Tropgo's Luxury Nut Mix. Each mouthful of our assorted snack contains almonds, brazil nuts, cashews, macadamias, and pecan nuts that will surely leave you wanting more.
Nutrient-Rich Flavoured Nuts: Our healthy nut mix are great addition to your diet as they contain protein, fibre, and other essential minerals that nourish your body.
Made with Finest Luxury Nuts: Sourced from the freshest and highest quality nuts snacks, our assorted whole nuts are carefully handpicked and packed to maintain the freshness of the nuts.

Versatile Assorted Whole Nuts: Not only does our raw nut mix offer a satisfying snacking experience, but our nuts are also great additional ingredient to your favourite pastry, a popular choice as a topping for your salad, yoghurt or even your oatmeal.

Healthy Snack on the Go: Tropgo's fresh nuts are an ideal on-the-go snack for anyone on the go or who has a fast-paced lifestyle, especially when you are out enjoying leisure activities, travelling, or just needing a simple snacking treat.
description: Product description Looking for your next snack to munch? Look no further, as we got you covered. Introducing Tropgo's Luxury Nuts Mix. Made with the freshest and highest quality nuts, our Tropgo's Nut Snack is the right choice when looking for a guilt-free snack that is healthy and delicious at the same time. Our delightful nut tub contains almonds, brazil nuts, cashews, macadamias, and pecan nuts, which are carefully handpicked and packed in a resealable and recyclable tub that maintains the freshness of the nuts. Not only does our savoury snack offer a satisfying snacking experience, but it is also a great additional ingredient for your favourite salad, mouth-watering pastries and even in your DIY trail mix. Whether you're on the go, at work, or just looking for a quick and convenient snack, Tropgo's nut mix is the right choice. What are you waiting for? Add to your cart now! Ingredients cashews
